components.name: Primary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #3B82F6; color: #ffffff; padding: 12px 24px; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; border: none; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.15s ease, transform 0.15s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background-color: #60A5FA; } .ds-btn-primary:active { background-color: #2563EB; transform: scale(0.98); }

components.name: Outline Button
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { background: transparent; color: #e5e5e5; padding: 12px 24px; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; border: 1px solid #3e3e3a; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 0.15s ease, color 0.15s ease; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { border-color: #60A5FA; color: #60A5FA; }

components.name: Feature Card
components.html:
Local Security

Receipt data is processed strictly on your hardware. No cloud, no external servers, absolute privacy.
components.css: .ds-card { background-color: #161615; border: 1px solid #3e3e3a; border-radius: 12px; padding: 24px; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 20px; font-weight: 600; color: #e5e5e5; margin-bottom: 8px; margin-top: 0; } .ds-card-text { font-size: 14px; color: #a1a09a; line-height: 1.5; margin: 0; }

narrative.overview: "The Local Enclave" is a secure, dark-themed digital sanctuary focusing on isolated local processing, sleek lines, and high-performance receipt data extraction. It reflects the core brand promise of privacy: financial data never leaves the user's computer. The design language avoids generic, soft SaaS pastel palettes and warm, saturating AI-beige default tones in favor of deep obsidian black backgrounds, structured grids, and striking blue scan glows.
keyCharacteristics: Deep obsidian backdrop for visual focus and battery-saving efficiency.
Flat surfaces structured by dark colors and crisp borders.
Glowing active scan cues in high-contrast cyan/blue.
Crisp, restrained transitions for high-performance interactive feedback.

rules.name: The Rarity Rule
rules.body: Secure Scan Blue is reserved strictly for interactive components, status indicators, and active scan highlights. It must cover less than 10% of any screen layout to preserve visual impact.

rules.name: The Balance Rule
rules.body: All Display and Headline headings must use text-wrap: balance to prevent awkward orphaned words and uneven line wrapping.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Elements do not float. Card containers remain flush with the background, using #3e3e3a borders for containment. Soft shadows are prohibited unless signifying an active, state-triggered scan glow.

dos: Do wrap all headings with text-wrap: balance or text-wrap: pretty.
Do use JetBrains Mono for metadata details such as file sizes, dates, and JSON tags.
Do preserve body text contrast of at least 4.5:1 against the dark background.
Do implement standard ease-out transitions (transition: all 0.15s ease) for hover states.
donts: Don't use warm cream, sand, paper, or beige background colors.
Don't use card side-stripe borders as accents.
Don't add arbitrary shadows to card components; rely on flat tonal layering instead.
